name: yogi-browser
description: Yogi Browser: Desktop HITL AI Automation
author: OpenHumana

scripts.electron:build: DEFAULT_GROQ_KEY=$DEFAULT_GROQ_KEY node scripts/build-electron.mjs && vite build && electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:win: DEFAULT_GROQ_KEY=$DEFAULT_GROQ_KEY node scripts/build-electron.mjs && vite build && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:mac: DEFAULT_GROQ_KEY=$DEFAULT_GROQ_KEY node scripts/build-electron.mjs && vite build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build:linux: DEFAULT_GROQ_KEY=$DEFAULT_GROQ_KEY node scripts/build-electron.mjs && vite build && electron-builder --linux
